# Template check passes when a closure is passed as a function argument to
# another package and the concrete type at the indirect call site matches.

check-templates ./...
! stderr .

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"html/template"
	"net/http"

	"example.com/app/handlers"
)

func main() {
	t := template.Must(template.ParseFiles("templates/base.html"))

	render := func(w http.ResponseWriter, data any) {
		_ = t.ExecuteTemplate(w, "base.html", data)
	}

	http.HandleFunc("/", handlers.HandleIndex(render))
}
-- handlers/handler.go --
package handlers

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

type Page struct {
	Title   string
	Content string
}

func HandleIndex(render func(http.ResponseWriter, any)) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		render(w, Page{Title: "Home", Content: "Welcome"})
	}
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint
-- templates/base.html --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
<p>{{.Content}}</p>
